text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I see the student council is busy asalways. I hope you're faring well,Air—um, I mean Ms. Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Why are you talking like that? Is<n>something
wrong?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Spe is always so polite around you, so I<n>thought I
should do the same...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
So that's it... Well, not that I mind formal<n>
language in general...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But you and I are far too close for that,<n>no? I see
no point in keeping each other<n>at arm's length.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Then I won't hold back in my speech... or<n>our
races.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh, that's what I like to hear.
